tech_stack.frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Zustand, Supabase SSR
tech_stack.theme: next-themes (class-based dark mode, system preference support)

database_schema.tenant: Cửa hàng độc lập thuộc về seller
database_schema.agent: Bot AI cấu hình per-tenant: name, persona, greeting (model/temperature/maxTokens do platform quản lý, ẩn khỏi user)

api_endpoints.POST /tenants: Tạo Tenant (nhận name, slug tự sinh từ FE)
api_endpoints.GET /tenants: Lấy danh sách tenants cho activeTenant dropdown
api_endpoints.GET /tenants/:tenantId/agents: Lấy danh sách agents theo tenant
api_endpoints.POST /tenants/:tenantId/agents: Tạo agent mới (name, persona, greeting only)
api_endpoints.POST /tenants/:tenantId/chat: Gửi tin nhắn và nhận reply từ AI bot (RAG pipeline)
api_endpoints.PATCH /tenants/:tenantId/conversations/:: Đánh dấu conversation đã giải quyết
api_endpoints.POST /tenants/:tenantId/conversations/:i: Nhân viên gửi tin nhắn trực tiếp, gửi qua FB/Zalo
api_endpoints.PATCH /tenants/:tenantId/conversations/:: Bàn giao hội thoại cho Bot xử lý tự động
api_endpoints.GET /tenants/:tenantId/knowledge/documen: Danh sách tài liệu đã upload
api_endpoints.GET /tenants/:tenantId/channels/facebook: Lấy danh sách Pages chờ chọn
api_endpoints.GET /plans: Danh sách gói dịch vụ (public, không cần auth)
api_endpoints.GET /sellers/me/usage: Thống kê sử dụng tổng hợp (AI responses, bots, team, knowledge)

features: Knowledge Upload UI — Drag & Drop, Document Table, Status Badges (Hoàn thành - Sprint 4)
Playground — Chat UI test Bot AI với RAG pipeline thực tế (Hoàn thành - Sprint 4)
Live Chat CRM UI — layout + data binding + human reply (Sprint 5)
Handover to Bot — button in CustomerPanel (Sprint 5)
Channel Management — Facebook OAuth + Zalo OA OAuth, setup guide, webhook URL copy (Sprint 6)
Facebook Multi-page Selection — interactive card UI for choosing FB Page when user manages multiple pages (Sprint 6)
Zalo OA Channel Section — OAuth connect/disconnect, status display (Sprint 6)
Real-time CRM — Socket.IO WebSocket, useSocket hook, reconnect resync, dedup (Sprint 5)
🎉 BE Module Complete — All 11 phases done
Deployment Guide — Render (BE) + Vercel (FE) free tier (Sprint 5)
Billing Usage UI — Usage page (progress bars), Billing page (plan comparison), QuotaWarningBanner, UpgradeModal (Sprint 7)
business_rules: Mỗi Tenant có Slug đơn nhất. FE tự convert name → slug khi gọi API.
FE dùng Zustand selectors (không destructure) để layout re-render ổn định với SSR.
Route Dashboard bảo vệ bằng middleware.ts gọi createServerClient.
fetchTenants() phải được gọi ở dashboard/layout.tsx (không chỉ ở page con).
AgentFormModal dùng key-based remount pattern thay vì useEffect+setState.
ThemeProvider bọc ở root layout với suppressHydrationWarning trên <html>.
Tailwind CSS v4 dark mode: @custom-variant dark.
Platform controls AI model — user chỉ cấu hình name/persona/greeting.
Knowledge upload: max 10MB, .txt/.pdf only, multipart/form-data qua axios.
Zustand store dùng loadedForTenantId pattern để gate loading.
CRM /dashboard/chat route dùng full-height layout (overflow-hidden).
Handover to Bot: chỉ hiện nút khi status OPEN/SNOOZED, optimistic update store.
WebSocket dedup: cả optimistic update và WS handler đều check message.id.
Channel page: parse URL query params (?facebook=connected, ?zalo=connected, ?facebook=select_page&session_id=xxx)
Facebook multi-page: pendingSessionId prop → component loads pages → user selects → onRefresh clears session to prevent remount bug
Channel disconnect: confirm dialog before disconnecting, toast notification on success
Billing: Plan interface fields must match Prisma schema exactly (price not priceMonthly, hasBrandingWatermark not hasBranding)
Billing: QuotaWarningBanner shows at >80% AI responses (amber), 100% (red), dismissable 24h via localStorage
Billing: UsageProgressBar handles limit=-1 (unlimited) and limit=0 edge cases
Billing: UpgradeModal is MVP — Zalo + Email contact only, no payment integration yet
coding_conventions: useEffect+setState bị cấm — thay bằng key remount hoặc useSyncExternalStore.
Zustand store: dùng selector riêng lẻ (không destructure).
CRM types: chat.service.ts là source of truth, types.ts re-export + UI helpers.
Store silent refresh: force=true giữ data cũ visible.
Store optimistic update: updateConversationLocally() thay vì force-fetch.
Socket hook pattern: src/hooks/useSocket.ts — returns { status, socket, reconnectCount }.
WS event handlers: payload typed as unknown + try-catch boundary + early return on invalid.
Stale closure prevention: useRef cho selectedConvId trong socket callbacks.
Axios auto-unwrap: response interceptor unwrap { success, data } → service layer vẫn dùng response.data.
Axios baseURL: /api/v1 prefix — webhook URL dùng raw base (không qua axios).
Channel section components: separate files per channel (FacebookChannelSection.tsx, ZaloChannelSection.tsx).
OAuth callback handling: page.tsx parses URL params → passes state to channel sections → sections manage own UI state.
Billing components: src/components/billing/*.tsx (UsageProgressBar, PlanComparisonTable, UpgradeModal, QuotaWarningBanner).
Billing pages: /dashboard/usage (progress cards + cycle info), /dashboard/billing (plan hero + comparison table).
